name: slime-pit
summary: A low-ceilinged sump where the cave floor has rotted into acidic slime — stained walls, dissolved bones, the slow drip of ceiling ichor.

primary_palette.note: the pit's centerpiece — a wide pool of living slime
acid-drip feature growing a fresh ooze below
a still-digesting shape half-dissolved in membrane
cultist offering-stone corroded into abstract shape

story_prompts: a cultist breeds oozes here for a patron
the slime is sapient and bargains by writing in its own surface
a dying adventurer on a dry ledge, out of spell slots and hope
rare alchemical reagents bloom in the acid — poachers risk dissolution for coin

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: very dim (0.1) with faint sickly-green glow from the ooze itself

anti_patterns: don't make the slime a neat circle — it spreads and puddles irregularly
dry walkways should hug walls, giving the party a route that isn't a cake-walk
no wood props in the pit itself — everything organic dissolves here
